mapper.insert: insert into wf_hist_task (id, instance_Id, task_Name, display_Name, task_Type, perform_Type, task_State, operator, create_Time, finish_Time, expire_Time, action_Url, parent_Task_Id, variable) values(#{id}, #{instanceId}, #{taskName}, #{displayName}, #{taskType}, #{performType}, #{taskState}, #{operator}, #{createTime}, #{finishTime}, #{expireTime}, #{actionUrl}, #{parentTaskId}, #{variable})
mapper.select: select id, instance_Id, task_Name, display_Name, task_Type, perform_Type, task_State, operator, create_Time, finish_Time, expire_Time, action_Url, parent_Task_Id, variable from wf_hist_task where id = #{taskId}
